title: Aleuritopteris formosana
taxonomy: Aleuritopteris formosana is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Aleuritopteris, which is a group of ferns that are native to tropical and subtropical regions. Aleuritopteris formosana is further classified as a member of the order Pteridales and the class Polypodiopsida. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other ferns. Aleuritopteris formosana is also sometimes referred to as a member of the family Marattiaceae.

In some Asian cultures, the plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues.
